mapper.insert: insert into special_report_setting (report_name, create_user_id, monitor_keywords, data_source, params, monitor_region, report_type, type_params, status_enabled, execute_status, last_execute_time, create_time,last_update_time) values (#{reportName}, #{createUserId}, #{monitorKeywords}, #{dataSource}, #{params}, #{monitorRegion}, #{reportType}, #{typeParams}, #{statusEnabled}, 0, #{lastExecuteTime}, now(),#{lastUpdateTime})
